commands.author: stevenepalmer

target.title: fix(ui): add agent selector to dreaming tab
target.body:
## Summary

- Closes #63558.
- The Control UI Dreaming tab needs to work across agent contexts. Without a selector and scoped reloads, users could switch visible context but still see the default agent's dreaming status, diary, or related memory state.
- This PR adds Dreaming agent selection, scopes Dreaming status/diary reloads to the selected agent, and keeps backward-compatible default-agent fallback when no agent id is supplied.
- It also opens report palace cards as wiki previews from Dreaming so report links stay in the Control UI review flow.
- Out of scope: changing Dreaming storage semantics, changing auth/network/tool execution behavior, or broad Control UI routing refactors.
- Review focus: selected-agent propagation through the Dreaming UI/controller/gateway path, report-card preview routing, and the generated i18n updates once the separate merge-conflict item is resolved.

## Linked context

Closes #63558.

Related context:
- This PR is a targeted Control UI/Dreaming fix for agent-specific Dreaming context.
- The current branch also has a separate tracked upstream merge conflict in generated Control UI i18n metadata/translation files; that conflict is not part of this body-only update.

Maintainer/owner request:
- No separate maintainer request beyond the linked issue and PR review automation.

## Real behavior proof (required for external PRs)

- Behavior or issue addressed: Dreaming lacked reliable selected-agent behavior. Agent selection in the Dreaming tab needed to scope `dreamingStatus` and `dreamDiary` loads to the selected agent instead of falling back to the default context.
- Real environment tested: local `openclaw/openclaw` checkout on Linux, Node.js v24.14.0, vitest v4.1.5.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch:
  - `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.gateway-methods.config.ts src/gateway/server-methods/doctor.test.ts`
  - Earlier UI proof on this PR: `cd ui && pnpm vitest run src/ui/views/dreaming.test.ts --reporter=verbose`
  - Earlier support checks on this PR: `pnpm tsgo:core` and `pnpm lint:core`
- Evidence after fix (screenshot, recording, terminal capture, console output, redacted runtime log, linked artifact, or copied live output):

~~~text
$ node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.gateway-methods.config.ts src/gateway/server-methods/doctor.test.ts

 RUN  v4.1.5 /tmp/pincer-openclaw

 ✓  gateway-methods  src/gateway/server-methods/doctor.test.ts (27 tests) 89ms

 Test Files  1 passed (1)
       Tests  27 passed (27)
    Start at  00:25:12
    Duration  470ms
~~~

~~~text
✓ src/ui/views/dreaming.test.ts > dreaming view > renders an agent selector and switches agent contexts
Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests       16 passed (16)
~~~

- Observed result after fix: `onSelectAgent` records the selected agent id, Dreaming reloads status and diary data scoped to that agent, gateway handlers accept optional `agentId`, and omitted `agentId` continues to resolve through the default-agent fallback.
- What was not tested: live browser interaction against a running multi-agent gateway.
- Proof limitations or environment constraints: this update only repairs the PR body template. The branch still has a separate generated i18n merge-tree conflict against current `upstream/main`, so this run did not push code or rerun the full branch validation suite.
- Before evidence (optional but encouraged): before the fix, Dreaming selection could call the session switch path while the subsequent `doctor.memory.*` loads still used `{}`, leaving the tab on default-agent Dreaming data.

## Tests and validation

Which commands did you run?

For this body repair:
- Fetched the current upstream `.github/pull_request_template.md` for the PR base branch through the authenticated GitHub API.
- Updated the PR body through the authenticated GitHub API.
- Re-read the live PR body through the authenticated GitHub API and verified every current top-level template heading is present.

Existing code validation recorded for this PR:
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.gateway-methods.config.ts src/gateway/server-methods/doctor.test.ts`
- `cd ui && pnpm vitest run src/ui/views/dreaming.test.ts --reporter=verbose`
- `pnpm tsgo:core`
- `pnpm lint:core`

What regression coverage was added or updated?

- `ui/src/ui/views/dreaming.test.ts` covers rendering the agent selector and changing agent context.
- `ui/src/ui/controllers/dreaming.test.ts` covers Dreaming controller selected-agent behavior.
- `src/gateway/server-methods/doctor.test.ts` covers optional agent-id handling and default fallback for the gateway methods.
- `ui/src/ui/app-settings.refresh-active-tab.node.test.ts` covers active-tab refresh state touched by the Dreaming flow.

What failed before this fix, if known?

- Dreaming did not expose the same agent-selection control expected in multi-agent Control UI contexts.
- Selected-agent changes could leave Dreaming status/diary loads scoped to the default agent rather than the chosen agent.

If no test was added, why not?

- N/A. The branch includes focused UI/controller/gateway regression coverage. This body-only worker item did not add code.

## Risk checklist

Did user-visible behavior change? (`Yes/No`)

Yes.

Did config, environment, or migration behavior change? (`Yes/No`)

No.

Did security, auth, secrets, network, or tool execution behavior change? (`Yes/No`)

No.

What is the highest-risk area?

- Showing Dreaming data for the wrong agent, or routing report/wiki preview interactions through the wrong Control UI context.

How is that risk mitigated?

- The selector and scoped reload paths are covered by focused Dreaming UI/controller tests and gateway method tests.
- Omitted `agentId` remains backward compatible through the existing default-agent fallback.

## Current review state

What is the next action?

- PR body template compliance is addressed by this update.
- The remaining branch action is the already-tracked generated Control UI i18n conflict/current-head check failure, not this body-only item.

What is still waiting on author, maintainer, CI, or external proof?

- Author/branch work remains blocked separately on generated `ui/src/i18n/.i18n/*` merge-tree conflicts against current `upstream/main`.
- The latest tracked current-head `checks-node-agentic-agents` failure remains associated with that branch-conflict/validation path.
- Prior worker notes record that local conflict resolution hit gateway-watch validation outside the body-update scope.

Which bot or reviewer comments were addressed?

- The current-template PR body gap is addressed here by preserving every current upstream template heading with concrete content.
